title: arthraxon nudus
intro: Arthraxon nudus, also known as grassy nut sedge, is a type of grass-like plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Arthraxon nudus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine.
